zh., Brereton, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾布雷雷頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Domville於1322年出生在英國爾奧可頓時，他的父親John Domville43歲，母親Matilda Brereton24歲。他和Cecily Mobberley至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於大約1395年在他的家鄉享年74歲。

zh-hans., Brereton, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾布雷雷頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Domville于1322年出生在英国爾奧可頓时，他的父亲John Domville43岁，母亲Matilda Brereton24岁。他和Cecily Mobberley至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于大约1395年在他的家乡享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Domville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dumville
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Donville (Calvados).  See also  Dumbell  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Domville was born in 1322, in Oxton, Cheshire, England, his father, John Domville, was 43 and his mother, Matilda Brereton, was 24. He had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Cecily Mobberley. He died about 1395, in his hometown, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Domville est né en 1322, à Oxton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John Domville, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Matilda Brereton, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Cecily Mobberley. Il est décédé environ 1395, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Domville 1322 in Oxton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Domville 43 und seine Mutter Matilda Brereton 24. Er hatte mit Cecily Mobberley mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb um 1395 im Alter von 74 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Domville è nato il nel 1322 nel Oxton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, John Domville, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Matilda Brereton, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Cecily Mobberley. Morì circa 1395, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Domvilleが1322年にイギリスチェシュアイアオクストンで生まれた時，父John Domvilleは43歳，母Matilda Breretonは24歳であった。彼はCecily Mobberleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1395年に故郷で74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Domville(이)가 1322년 영국 체실르 스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Domville(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Brereton(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Cecily Mobberley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1395년 그의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn., Brereton, Cheshire, England: Brereton, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Domville nasceu em 1322, em Oxton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Domville, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Brereton, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Cecily Mobberley. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1395, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Domville родился в 1322 г. в местности окстон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Domville было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda Brereton, 24. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Cecily Mobberley. Он умер около 1395 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Domville nació en 1322, en Oxton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Domville, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Matilda Brereton, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Cecily Mobberley. Murió aproximadamente 1395, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años.
